messages.title: Mileage Information :
messages.text: Car rental options above include unlimited mileage unless otherwise indicated. For mileage terms with Auto Europe first select a car, then review Rate Details.

messages.title: Rates are shown in ##CURRENCY##. The total estimated car rental cost includes govt. taxes and surcharges. Total price is based on information available at the time of booking. Charges for optional services, such as fuel and insurance waivers, etc. are not included. Actual total cost might vary based on additional items added, or services used. Currency conversions are based on today’s exchange rates, and may vary at the time of rental.
messages.text: The makes and models shown are examples only. Actual makes and models are subject to availability and vary by supplier.
